{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the information provided in the documents, bone is primarily composed of collagen and mineral components. The documents mention that the bone extracellular matrix consists of inorganic (mineral) and organic matrices, with the organic matrix being predominantly type I collagen. Additionally, the mineral component, mainly in the form of hydroxyapatite, provides bone its strength, stiffness, and resistance to compressive forces. Therefore, the collagen and mineral components work together to resist compression in bone.", "answer_choice": "D"}
